subject: Vector index outage postmortem
body: We lost 2 hours of search availability on Tuesday due to a shard failure in the vector index. Root cause was a memory leak. The team is currently short two open engineering reqs, which is slowing down our incident response and roadmap work.

subject: This Week in Snacks
body: Check out the new snacks in the break room this week!

subject: Old vendor contract renewal
body: Reminder that the search vendor contract renewal was completed last quarter.
